rag_rules: Fix type mismatches in AGREE expressions by ensuring boolean types are used where required, such as in guarantee conditions.
Validate that all identifiers in AGREE contracts are visible in the current scope and properly declared.
generic_rules: Use only visible AADL features or declared helpers in AGREE contracts to avoid unresolved references.
Ensure AGREE scalar types match AADL conventions (int, real, bool) to prevent resolution errors.
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes and type-level assumptions in type scopes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks within component types or implementations.
Assignments in implementation scope must target valid output features or declared auxiliary variables.
anti_patterns: Do not reference implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
Do not use invalid or unresolved identifiers in guarantee expressions or equation declarations.
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
AGREE validator diagnostics and repair strategies
Component type annexes and implementation annexes
